title: ononis viscosa subsp. polyphylla
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. polyphylla, also known as sticky wild candytuft, is a subspecies of the Ononis viscosa plant, a type of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Ononis viscosa subsp. polyphylla is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
